latestCheckpoint.summary: Review/orchestration scrub completed with three concrete fixes.
latestCheckpoint.understanding: The orchestration packages had latent truthfulness bugs around critique verdict drift, Ralph review gating, and docs runtime entrypoint resolution.
recentChanges: Critique records now downgrade from pass when a new active finding is appended after a passing run.
Ralph waiting-state calculation keeps verifier blockers authoritative across iteration and critique updates.
Docs runtime resolution now accepts extensionless shebang entrypoints before falling back to pi.
latestCheckpoint.nextAction: Hand completed scope to manager for consolidation and closure.

approval.summary: Review/orchestration worker changes are approved for consolidation.
rationale: Targeted package tests passed for critique, Ralph, and docs.

consolidation.summary: Review/orchestration worker changes were consolidated into the main workspace patch.
